allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pkgs = data.get\(''packages'', {}\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\): if ''eslint-config-next'' in k and ''node_modules/'' in k: print\(k\) print\(json.dumps\(v.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), indent=2\)\) print\(json.dumps\(v.get\(''peerDependencies'',{}\), indent=2\)\) break ")
